session_summary: User is bored at work on a slow, quiet day. Their main hired project starts next week; they’re waiting on another contributor for side-project inputs. They want to test/iterate on voice-style interaction but can’t speak aloud in the office.
open_loops: Find low-profile ways for user to interact (voice/dictation) without talking in office
Determine user’s role and what the side project is about
Clarify what platform/app they’re testing and what the voice feature does
Clarify what the user meant by 'I'll just comparison' and what exactly they are comparing

user_facts.context: Bored at work; day is slow and quiet
user_facts.constraint: Cannot talk aloud in office; would look weird for testing
user_facts.work_status: Main hired project starts next week
user_facts.side_project_status: Waiting on another contributor for materials/inputs

last_turn.user: It's a little better I guess.
last_turn.assistant: Offered discreet options: silent voice-run via typed utterances, command/edge-case test list, or side-project prep; asked which and what platform/app it's for.
